description: CompositionGrey printed sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, has a square neck with a panelled upper chest that has lace and crochet detailing, crochet detailing along the innser side of the shoulder straps and has a pleated antebellum bodiceFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
